request.description:
## basic search
**limit** : number
- `limit=10`

**offset** : number
- `offset=0`

**query** : string
- `query=john`

___

## Post specific
**deleted**: boolean
toggle on to only filter posts that are deleted
- `deleted=true`
- `deleted=false`

**sort**: string
enum of createdAt, updatedAt, viewCount, likeCount
- `sort=createdAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=updatedAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=viewCount|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=likeCount|desc` (or `asc`)

**caseSensitive**: boolean
enable case-sensitive search (default: false)
- `caseSensitive=true`

## basic search
**limit** : number
- `limit=10`

**offset** : number
- `offset=1`

**query** : string
- `query=cat`

___

## Comment specific
**resourceType**: string
enum of "POST" or "COMMENT"
- `resourceType=POST`
- `resourceType=COMMENT`

**deleted** : boolean
toggle on to only filter comments that are deleted
- `deleted=true`

**sort**: string
enum of createdAt, updatedAt, likeCount
- `sort=createdAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=updatedAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=likeCount|desc` (or `asc`)

## Credit Purchase specific

enum of purchasedAt, amount, pricePaid

- `sort=amount|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=pricePaid|desc` (or `asc`)

**caseSensitive**: boolean
enable case-sensitive search (default: false)
- `caseSensitive=true`

___

enum of purchasedAt, amount, pricePaid
- `sort=purchasedAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=amount|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=pricePaid|desc` (or `asc`)

- `caseSensitive=true`

## basic search
**limit** : number
- `limit=10`

**offset** : number
- `offset=0`

**query** : string
- `query=john`

___

## Product specific
**status**: string
enum of "ACTIVE", "REFUNDED"
- `status=ACTIVE`
- `status=REFUNDED`

**sort**: string
enum of purchasedAt, refundedAt
- `sort=purchasedAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=refundedAt|desc` (or `asc`)

**caseSensitive**: boolean
enable case-sensitive search (default: false)
- `caseSensitive=true`

## basic search
**limit** : number
- `limit=10`

**offset** : number
- `offset=0`

**query** : string
- `query=john`

___

## Subscription specific
**status**: string
enum of "ACTIVE", "CANCELED", "PAST_DUE", "TRIALING"
- `status=ACTIVE`
- `status=CANCELED`

**tier**: string
enum of "FREE", "BASIC", "PRO"
- `tier=PRO`
- `tier=BASIC`

**sort**: string
enum of createdAt, updatedAt
- `sort=createdAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=updatedAt|desc` (or `asc`)

**caseSensitive**: boolean
enable case-sensitive search (default: false)
- `caseSensitive=true`

## basic search
**limit** : number
- `limit=10`

**offset** : number
- `offset=0`

**query** : string
- `query=john`

___

## Ticket specific
**status**: string
enum of "OPEN", "RESPONDED", "CLOSED"
- `status=OPEN`
- `status=RESPONDED`
- `status=CLOSED`

**sort**: string
enum of createdAt
- `sort=createdAt|desc` (or `asc`)

**caseSensitive**: boolean
enable case-sensitive search (default: false)
- `caseSensitive=true`

## basic search
**limit** : number
- `limit=10`

**offset** : number
- `offset=0`

**query** : string
- `query=john`

___

## User specific
**roles**: string
comma-separated enum of "USER", "ADMIN", "MOD"
- `roles=USER`
- `roles=ADMIN,MOD`
- `roles=USER,ADMIN`

**statuses**: string
comma-separated enum of "ACTIVE", "SUSPENDED", "BANNED", "DELETED"
- `statuses=ACTIVE`
- `statuses=SUSPENDED,BANNED`
- `statuses=ACTIVE,DELETED`

**sort**: string
enum of createdAt, updatedAt
- `sort=createdAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=updatedAt|desc` (or `asc`)

**caseSensitive**: boolean
enable case-sensitive search (default: false)
- `caseSensitive=true`

## basic search
**limit** : number
- `limit=10`

**offset** : number
- `offset=1`
**cursor** : number
- `cursor=1`

**query** : string
- `query=cat`

**search fields** : string
only search in these included fields (can be single or many at once)
- `searchFields:title,content,creator.username`
- `searchFields:title`

**statuses** : string
filter based of status. enum of: "DRAFT","PUBLISHED","ARCHIVED","SCHEDULED"
- `statuses:DRAFT`
**deleted** : boolean
toggle on to only filter comments that are deleted
- `deleted=true`

**sort**: string
enum of createdAt, updatedAt
- `sort=createdAt|desc` (or `asc`)
- `sort=updatedAt|desc` (or `asc`)
